codeReview.summary: Current HEAD satisfies the feature contract. `tests/app.test.ts` contains explicit route-level proof that `/onchain/networks/:network/tokens/:address` surfaces live DeFiLlama pricing on success, that token detail/info fall back to seeded pricing when DeFiLlama returns null, and that token OHLCV falls back to degraded seeded pool aggregation when The Graph swaps are unavailable. `src/modules/onchain.ts` implements that behavior by routing token detail/info through `fetchLiveSimpleTokenPrice` and by aggregating token OHLCV from pool series with graceful fallback when provider-backed swap data is absent.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared architecture note is stale for onchain behavior. It still says all onchain routes are fixture-backed and describes token OHLCV as synthetic-only, even though current HEAD uses live DeFiLlama pricing for token detail/info routes and live The Graph swaps for token/pool OHLCV when available.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/.factory/library/architecture.md says all 29 onchain routes are fixture-backed; compare with /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/src/modules/onchain.ts:1271-1310, 2706-2840, and 3220-3283, which call live DeFiLlama/The Graph-backed helpers and fall back only when providers return null.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, current HEAD tests, runtime implementation, and shared-state docs. This feature passes on current HEAD: the missing token-route proof is now explicit and the runtime behavior remains contract-compliant with graceful fallback paths.
